name: Fruity Seafood
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Green prawns, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Saute apple and shallots until soft.
3. Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute longer.
4. Stir in flour, then add apple juice. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Add salt and dill, simmering for 5 minutes.
6. Add prawns and scallops; cook until almost tender.
7. Add banana 5 minutes before the end of cooking time.
8. Stir in cream and heat through.
9. Serve with fluffy or fragrant rice.
NB: In this recipe, as well as many others, I use evaporated skim milk instead of cream, which is better for the arteries and makes no great compromise to taste or texture.
